text:
if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null; then
  sha256=$(sha256sum "$release_directory/$basename" | cut -d ' ' -f 1)
elif command -v shasum >/dev/null; then
  sha256=$(shasum -a 256 "$release_directory/$basename" | cut -d ' ' -f 1)
else
  echo "$0 requires sha256sum or shasum to be installed on the system."
  exit 1
fi

spaceship::deprecated() {
  [[ -n $1 ]] || return
  local deprecated=$1 message=$2
  local deprecated_value=${(P)deprecated} # the value of variable name $deprecated
  [[ -n $deprecated_value ]] || return
  print -P "%B$deprecated%b is deprecated. $message"
}

exit_if_unsupported_version() {
	local current_version="$1"
	local supported_version="$2"
	if [ "$current_version" -lt "$supported_version" ]; then
		display_message "$(unsupported_version_message)"
		exit 1
	fi
}

if [[ -f "$project_root_dir/settings.gradle" ]]; then
		local build_file_name
		build_file_name=$(grep "^rootProject\.buildFileName" "$project_root_dir/settings.gradle" \
			| sed -n -e "s/rootProject\.buildFileName = [\'\"]\(.*\)[\'\"]/\1/p")
		gradle_build_file="$project_root_dir/${build_file_name:-build.gradle}"
	fi

while [ "${pathdir}" != '' ] && [ "${pathdir}" != '.' ] && [ "${pathdir}" != '/' ] &&
      [ "${pathdir}" != "${tree}" ] && [ "${pathdir}" != "${previous_pathdir}" ]; do
    previous_pathdir="${pathdir}"
    pathdir=$(dirname "${previous_pathdir}")
  done

if [[ $JAVA_SPEC_VERSION -gt 17 && $JAVA_SPEC_VERSION -lt 24 ]]; then
      # set security manager property to allow calls to System.setSecurityManager() at runtime
      FLINK_ENV_JAVA_OPTS="$FLINK_ENV_JAVA_OPTS -Djava.security.manager=allow"
    fi

if [ -z "$HADOOP_CONF_DIR" ] && [ -z "$HADOOP_CLASSPATH" ]; then
    if [ -d "/etc/hadoop/conf" ]; then
        echo "Setting HADOOP_CONF_DIR=/etc/hadoop/conf because no HADOOP_CONF_DIR or HADOOP_CLASSPATH was set."
        HADOOP_CONF_DIR="/etc/hadoop/conf"
    fi
fi

spaceship::core::start() {
  # Clear the cache before every render
  spaceship::cache::clear

  for section in $(spaceship::union $SPACESHIP_PROMPT_ORDER $SPACESHIP_RPROMPT_ORDER); do
    spaceship::core::refresh_section "$section"
  done
}

if [ -n "${TF_BUILD+x}" ]; then
			echo "##vso[task.setvariable variable=DEBUG_FILES_OUTPUT_DIR]"
		elif [ -n "${GITHUB_ACTIONS+x}" ]; then
			echo "debug-files-output-dir=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
		else
			echo "[ERROR] No CI environment detected. Debug artifact-related variable won't be unset."
			exit 1
		fi

for f in examples/ridt91.eps examples/snowflak.ps $SRC/pdf_seeds/pdf.pdf; do
  # Prepend the number of bytes used for picking options in the opts fuzzer
  printf "\x01\x01" | cat - "$f" > tmp_file.txt
  mv tmp_file.txt $f
  s=$(sha1sum "$f" | awk '{print $1}')
  cp "$f" "$WORK/gs_device_pdfwrite_opts_fuzzer_seeds/$s"
done

local style
    for style in lean lean-8colors classic rainbow pure; do
      [[ -r $__p9k_root_dir/config/p10k-$style.zsh ]]                      || {
        $0_error "$__p9k_root_dir_u/config/p10k-$style.zsh is not readable"
        return 1
      }
    done

if [ -z "${MY_JAVA_HOME}" ] && ! type java > /dev/null 2> /dev/null; then
        echo "Please specify JAVA_HOME. Either in Flink config ./conf/config.yaml or as system-wide JAVA_HOME."
        exit 1
    else
        export JAVA_HOME="${MY_JAVA_HOME}"
    fi

main() {
	if supported_tmux_version_ok; then
		set_tpm_path
		set_tpm_key_bindings
		source_plugins
	fi
}
main

if ! _command_exists vim; then
	_log_warning "Without 'vim', these aliases just aren't that useful..."
fi

if __docker_compose_has_option "--stop|-s"; then
				__docker_compose_complete_services
			else
				__docker_compose_complete_services --filter status=stopped
			fi

if ! _command_exists __git_find_subcommand; then
	alias __git_find_subcommand=__git_find_on_cmdline
fi

if ! _command_exists __git_find_on_cmdline; then
	alias __git_find_on_cmdline=__git_find_subcommand
fi

if shopt -qo nounset; then
	__bash_it_restore_nounset=true
	shopt -uo nounset
else
	__bash_it_restore_nounset=false
fi

if [ ! -f /etc/proxmox-backup/user.cfg ]; then
  header_info
  msg_error "Proxmox Backup Server not detected!"
  exit
fi

if ! dpkg -s proxmox-mailgateway-container >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  ! dpkg -s proxmox-mailgateway >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  msg_error "This script is only intended for Proxmox Mail Gateway"
  exit 232
fi

if ! command -v pveversion >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  header_info
  msg_error "\n No PVE Detected!\n"
  exit
fi

if [[ "$has_443_mapping" == "false" ]]; then
        ssl_warning_mapping="http:80"
        proxy_host_https_port_candidate="$proxy_host_http_port_candidate"
        proxy_container_https_port_candidate="$proxy_container_http_port_candidate"
        proxy_container_https_port="$proxy_container_http_port"
      fi

if _omb_util_binary_exists ack-grep; then
  _omb_util_alias afind='ack-grep -il'
else
  _omb_util_alias afind='ack -il'
fi

if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then
        echo "[ERROR] Cannot run BashJavaUtils to execute command ${cmd}." 1>&2
        # Print the output in case the user redirect the log to console.
        echo "$output" 1>&2
        exit 1
    fi

if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then
      echo "[ERROR] Could not parse configurations properly."
      echo "[ERROR] Raw output from BashJavaUtils:"
      echo "$java_utils_output"
      exit 1
    fi

if [[ -z ${execution_results} ]]; then
        echo "[ERROR] The execution result is empty." 1>&2
        exit 1
    fi

if useradd -r -m -d /opt/pulse-home -s /usr/sbin/nologin pulse; then
  msg_ok "Created User"
else
  msg_error "User creation failed"
  exit 71
fi

if [ ! -f /usr/bin/bash.real ]; then
  # Only run this once.
  python /usr/local/bin/make_build_replayable.py
fi
